nasb.text: Now Ahab told Jezebel all that Elijah had done, and how he had killed all the prophets with the sword.

esv.text: Ahab told Jezebel all that Elijah had done, and how he had killed all the prophets with the sword.

cnv.text: 亞哈把以利亞所行的一切，和他用刀殺死眾先知的一切事，都告訴了耶洗別。

ccb.text: 亚哈把以利亚做的一切事以及他怎样杀掉所有巴力先知的经过，都告诉了耶洗别，
